item.title: Download Starus Data Restore Pack 5.0
item.description: Starus Data Restore Pack is a software that creates a full snapshot of the disk being restored to perform the restore operation on the virtual image instead of the actual disc. This allows to minimize any potential negative effects that a wide range of read operations can do on the damaged drive. Starus Data Restore Pack is the fastest data recovery software on the market. item.title: Download dbForge Unit Test for SQL Server 2025.3.107
item.description: dbForge Unit Test for SQL Server is an intuitive and convenient GUI for deploying automated unit testing in SQL Server Management Studio. The SQL database unit testing tool dbForge is based on the open source tSQLt framework, so SQL developers can now benefit from writing unit tests in regular T-SQL. The functionality of Unit Tests allows you to develop stable and reliable code that can be accurately regression tested at the unit level. Features of dbForge Unit Test for SQL...

item.title: Download dbForge Index Manager for SQL Server 2025.3.107
item.description: dbForge Index Manager for SQL Server is a tool that allows you to quickly gather index fragmentation statistics and detect databases in need of maintenance.
